About Onyx Garage Door

12+ years serving Las Vegas and surrounding areas

Onyx Garage Door has been serving the Las Vegas Valley since 2012, helping homeowners with everything from squeaky hinges to complete garage door replacements. We started small but grew quickly by focusing on honest service and quality workmanship.

Our approach is simple: we listen to your concerns, assess the situation thoroughly, and explain your options clearly. No pushy sales tactics, just straightforward solutions tailored to your home and budget.

As a locally owned business, we're committed to our community. We sponsor little league teams in Summerlin, donate services to veterans in North Las Vegas, and support local food banks in Henderson.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Onyx Garage Door

Trusted garage door professionals serving Las Vegas, NV and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.

555-gar-r93
